items.claim: Tabitha Richi has become too reliant on her striking instead of her natural grappling and clinch wrestling.
items.quote: she's gotten too in love with the hands... her natural ability has more so been in the grappling side, in the fence wrestling side, in the working in the clinch side.

items.claim: Fatima Mle is a superior kicker compared to Tabitha Richi.
items.quote: she's a better kicker than Tabitha Reichi.

items.claim: Fatima Mle demonstrated high-level takedown ability against Angela Hill.
items.quote: Fatima Klene was taking her down pretty much at will.

items.claim: Chase Hooper missed weight for his fight against Mitch Ramirez.
Chase Hooper has shown a lack of durability by getting clipped in recent UFC fights.
items.quote: he's been getting clipped in the UFC.

items.claim: Chase Hooper's submission grappling is the biggest advantage in his matchup against Mitch Ramirez.
items.quote: The biggest advantage in this fight is Chase Hooper submission grappling.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan utilizes a bladed stance and explosive movement to set up his attacks.
items.quote: he'll give you that bladed stance like MVP does, balls of his feet, and then all of a sudden he'll just bum rush you with something.
